meaning: n.(东非和南非用语)匠人,手艺人,专家
examples: He's become quite a fundi on wine.
Congratulations on coming this far in your Fundi course.
Originally from Kenya, Caleb Fundi has lived in Berlin for the last 10 years.
Fundi Frank is one of Kenya's foremost fashion designers and a one-man brand.
And for Fundi Frank, a fashion designer for pop stars with a phone in each hand, networking and socialising is a crucial part of promoting his brand.
